item.title: Another win for the People and blow to Data Centers!
item.description: https://substack.com/@corporateclapback/note/c-276457195?r=5s0b&utm_source=notes-share-action&utm_medium=web https://bsky.app/profile/ebonstorm.bsky.social/post/3modqupitrs2d One state. One law. One sentence that says everything: “Big Tech pays its own bills. Not you.” While Washington D.C. argues, while other states debate, while communities across America watch their electricity bills climb month after month — Oklahoma quietly did something extraordinary. It passed a law that no other state had the courage to pass first. And it takes effect in just 19 days — July 1, 2026. This is the story every American needs to read today. THE LAW THAT CHANGED EVERYTHING — AND THE GOVERNOR WHO SIGNED IT On Monday, May 11, 2026, Oklahoma Governor Kevin Stitt signed House Bill 2992 — the Data Center Consumer Ratepayer Protection Act of 2026 — into law. The name is long. The message is simple. The law is designed to protect Oklahoma families, small businesses, and traditional utility customers from rising utility and infrastructure costs tied to large-scale energy users such as data centers, cryptocurrency mining operations, and artificial intelligence facilities. That’s it. That is the entire point. Big Tech builds a data center in Oklahoma — Big Tech pays for the power lines, the substations, and every infrastructure upgrade its facility demands. Not your grandmother. Not the family-owned restaurant. Not the farmer running a well pump. Not you. The law requires large-load customers that add 75 megawatts or more of demand to sign long-term agreements covering all infrastructure costs tied to their projects — rather than spreading those costs across the general rate base. 75 megawatts. That is the threshold. Any data center, AI facility, or crypto mining operation that demands that much power must foot its own bill — every dollar of it — before connecting to Oklahoma’s grid. AND THE VOTE THAT PASSED IT LEFT NO ROOM FOR ARGUMENT The Data Center Consumer Ratepayer Protection Act passed the House floor and the Senate floor with a unanimous vote — winning approval from every single lawmaker who voted on it. Unanimous. In both chambers. In Oklahoma — one of the most politically contested legislative environments in the country. The bill passed unanimously in both the House Utilities Policy Committee and the House Energy and Natural Resources Oversight Committee before reaching the full floor. At least 36 House and Senate lawmakers from both parties signed on as co-authors of the legislation — reflecting broad bipartisan support across the entire Legislature. Republicans. Democrats. Rural lawmakers. Urban lawmakers. All signing the same bill. All sending the same message. When a bill passes unanimously in both chambers with 36 bipartisan co-authors TLDR NEW LAW IN OKLAHOMA Data Centers Can't Pass Their Energy Costs to Consumers The law requires large-load customers adding 75 megawatts or more of demand to sign long-term agreements covering infrastructure costs tied to their projects, rather than spreading those costs across the general rate base. 75 megawatts. That is the threshold. Any data center, AI facility, or crypto mining operation that demands that much power must foot its own bill — every dollar of it — before connecting to Oklahoma’s grid. Currently these centers are built and local consumers rates rise. Oklahoma says NO.

item.title: Today's MAGAt disappointment: Nate Bargatze
item.description: I've got tickets to an upcoming show that I was really looking forward to, to see him a second time, and just saw this. I've watched every one of his specials and now it feels like a family member died. Sooo disappointed and disgusted. I'd sell the tickets but my daughters and other family members are going as a group, so I have to go and watch him and pretend I still find this bootlicking MAGAt funny. What the actual fuck Nate? #natebargatzeisamagat #natebargatze #whatthefucknate

item.title: small phone dump (may have political nuances)
item.description:
Sanders would have won against Trump. AOC would win against everything what GOP or the right could send to the race.
Medicare for all. Tax the Rich. Abolish ICE. Free Palestine. That's minimum.
A picture is worth a thousand words.
OMG! It was always us, not the owners, who pay shitty!
That's what she said. #5
Donavan McKinney (MI-13), Melat Kiros (CO-01), Justin J. Pearson (TN-09)
Incompetent doesn't even begin to describe it.
Republicans are finally achieving equal rights.
Let us taste those sweet tears.
Kat Abughazaleh endorses Democrat Francesca Hong for Wisconsin governor. #10
That is Democratic Socialist Hartzell Gray running for MO-4 U.S (Kansas City). He is on a level with the GOAT Congresswoman Summer Lee.
Diaper Donny should be screened for IODS ((Ilhan Omar Derangement Syndrome) during his next weekly checkup.
Cori Bush’s endorsed for a comeback to MO-1 by some old white angry man. ;D (No joke, Bernie endorsed her today with the words: “She’ll fight Republican attacks on our freedoms and transform our economy & government to work for everyone—not just the powerful.”)

item.title: U.S. propaganda in the movie theater
item.description: We went to the movies (AMC theater) and they showed the new tax payer funded pro-Trump propaganda commercial before the film. Even in our fairly conservative city, the audience also loudly booed. I was disgusted and wanted to do a post about it. However, I found this letter online and decided it was much more eloquent than I could put together. I'm an atheist myself, but this gentleman expresses his anger quite well. So kudos on him.
item.dc:creator: thebonesofmyancestors

item.title: Why Trans v. Trans Discourse Often Turns Toxic
item.description: My follow up video to the “Pick Me” trans woman, is a deep dive into why Trans vs Trans Discourse so quickly turns toxic online… almost every time. There is also a metaphor about gladiators in there. (LIVE CHATTING ON YOUTUBE @ 7:30am PST) https://youtu.be/KuzIuxIIXpM Am Adding this Disclaimer from now on to my Youtube posts here: All of my Youtube revenue goes to Trans Charities. This is me sharing my art here because I love doing that with the community :D
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: It's real..
item.description: Yes, Sesame Street featured a parody character named Donald Grump. He made multiple appearances on the show, notably as a wealthy, scheming Grouch with a poofy orange wig who famously declared that his name was "on every piece of trash in town". The show has a long history of spoofing the real estate mogul and television personality across several decades: Ronald Grump (1988): A scheming landlord Muppet appeared in a storyline to build "Grump Tower" and tried to evict Oscar the Grouch. Ronald Grump (1994): The character was portrayed in human form by actor Joe Pesci, who wore orange makeup and a lookalike wig in an anniversary special. Donald Grump (2005): At the height of The Apprentice's popularity, the show featured a "Donald Grump" Muppet. He arrived on Sesame Street to commission an apprentice, only to instantly "fire" Elmo for doing a good job.
item.dc:creator: FuManLu

item.title: GovBrief Today #501
item.description: McMinnville, Tennessee, is exactly the kind of small town the data center industry expects to roll over. The industry has been dropping data centers into small towns, betting that quick tax revenue will smother any local objection. McMinnville's board would not take the bait. Instead of rubber-stamping a permit, it called an 18-month time-out to study what the project would do to the water, the grid, and the air, and write real rules first. Coffee County next door did it too that day, and local governments across the country are making the same unglamorous but smart choice. In times this dark, it is easy to miss the government that quietly does right by you, especially the local agencies that shape your daily life far more than Washington usually does. That is why I built a new category into GovBrief this week. It is called Good Government, and it marks the nights a government, somewhere, delivers. McMinnville's turn in the spotlight is tonight. I've emailed 7,831 stories over 501 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260615-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/g7-iran [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-june15 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/rfk-hantavirus [4] https://go.govbrief.today/ocean-obs [5] https://go.govbrief.today/spr-level [6] https://go.govbrief.today/b52-crash [7] https://go.govbrief.today/newsom-investigation [8] https://go.govbrief.today/page-scotus [9] https://go.govbrief.today/engineer-charged [10] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-soccer [11] https://go.govbrief.today/algae-pool [12] https://go.govbrief.today/July4-trump [13] https://go.govbrief.today/tn-datacenter [14] https://go.govbrief.today/garden-lawsuit Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: HARLEY QUINN X WONDER WOMAN BODY PAINT - MCROFT07
item.description: I'm on twitch most of the time btw PLEASE find me on https://linktr.ee/mcroft07 since I only post a small selection of my work here. I was thinking it would be fun to paint wonder woman (again) but if it was Harley quinn wearing her costume, which I understand she has done in Suicide Squad (game) and then I was wondering if it happened in the comics at all, surely it must have!? And then I found Harley's Little Black Book where her and WW swapped outfits and I was like YESSS so then I loosely based it off that. One of the details I loved about that cover was that the WW suit is too big for Harley because ofc WW is Amazonian, so I wanted to hint to this a little bit by having the tiara lopsided. :) Anyway the lasso took me forever to edit in after effects but I'm glad I did it because I was learning new skills :) fuck gen ai Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror I have patreon now and I do some of my dream projects on there! I'm really excited about it, I am also doing some bigger cosplay builds! No, it is not AI. I do not use AI at all in any of my videos. I just looked at pictures and did what I wanted with the design tbh. I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. Thank you to everyone who wants to help me with VPNs etc but please note that I am highly concerned about someone doxxing me so I will not accept any offer on this. I also don't want to pay for a VPN to use ONE website, so I just click through until I can get through, if I can get through, post and interact with the community for a while then turn it off. This is a real threat to me, I have been grabbed in the streets and had people attempt to follow me home before, so I take safety online and offline very seriously. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. No it isn't AI, I fucking hate AI I used to do nothing with my hands and people told me I wasn't really painting, so I started painting bits while lip syncing and while recording and doing the transitions and people still hate it so honestly go fuck yourself and don't watch my shit then you're boring I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. If you're still here, phew gosh this is a LOT I KNOW! I just started taking up reading again and learned that dark romance does NOT mean vampires. My god. I normally read non fiction books to educate myself further and thought I would try something different. Long story short, I found a "dark romance", thought the blurb and cover might be about vampires, didn't see the content warning (kindle skipped to page 1) and it was about DV. Good lord, I'm glad I have therapy today hahahaha fml, I guess I learned the hard way. I'm out here still being a human clown To everyone who thinks I paint it "wrong" you do it, show me it and I will critique it. The difference is that I will try and put myself out there, I respect artists to grow themselves and find their own way and style because I am an artist, not some blindsided bystander buffoon who thinks they know more about a subject they've never tried. Check yourself with your unsolicited advice and criticism. On that topic, I can handle criticism which is usually the defence people take when I point out that I did not ask. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Why is this so cute...
item.description: "Kinesin proteins are tiny molecular 'delivery workers' inside your cells that literally walk along microscopic tracks carrying important cargo where it needs to go."
